title: He And She
content:
When I am dead you'll find it hard,
        Said he,
    To ever find another man
        Like me.

    What makes you think, as I suppose
        You do,
    I'd ever want another man
        Like you?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Eugene Fitch Ware delivers a powerful performance in "He And She"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
